milestones: solution.py exists and contains a multi-user authentication system supporting simultaneous login with user registration and credential validation
Users can create language exercises of multiple types including grammar quizzes, vocabulary tests, and writing prompts
Exercise sharing functionality allows users to share their created exercises with other users and access shared exercises
The system provides real-time feedback on exercises: correct/incorrect scoring for quizzes and grammar or vocabulary suggestions for writing prompts
Peer review system enables users to review and provide textual feedback on other users' exercises
Comprehensive test cases are included covering multi-user login, exercise creation and sharing, peer review workflows, invalid input handling, and concurrent user edge cases
